tagline: Stop surprise bills before they hit.

designSystem.style: Dark-first fintech with deep navy backgrounds, vibrant teal primary accent, and a risk-aware color system (teal=safe, amber=caution, red=danger). Cards use subtle glass-like layering with colored left-border accents on alerts. Typography is bold and hierarchical with 800-weight headlines. Micro-interactions include press-scale effects on action buttons and smooth opacity transitions between screens.

screens: Dashboard — Expense weather hero card with risk score, urgent bills list, 7-day bar chart, and quick action buttons
Forecast — 14-day scrollable day picker, selected-day bill breakdown, balance projection SVG line chart
Bills — Subscription list with alert badges (price hike, trial, overlap, duplicate), filter pills, per-card action CTAs
Alerts — Actionable notification feed with severity color-coding, impact chips, dismiss control
Settings — Theme toggle (dark/light), notification toggles, connected bank accounts, profile card
